name: Decadent Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 sweet red peppers, roasted and diced
1 lb. lobster meat, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together vinegar, oil, scallions, salt, and pepper; set aside.
2. Bring a pot of salted water to a boil and cook potatoes until just tender, about 8 minutes. Do not overcook.
3. Remove potatoes from the water, drain, and rinse to stop cooking. Do not discard the cooking water.
4. Blanch the corn kernels in the same salted water until it returns to a boil; drain.
5. Add corn, lobster, and roasted red peppers to potato cubes, toss with dressing.
6. Sprinkle with chopped chives if desired.
